name: Sweat440 Franchise Systems, LLC
validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort size and definition with franchisor.
Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Auditor firm name not captured from text layer (on letterhead image pages 55-56)
Tennessee company-owned studio table shows closure but FDD notes relocation
Franchise fees receivable net of $945K fees and $756K commissions to same party — identity of party and commission arrangement unclear
Parent studio salary/payroll (14-16% of revenue) appears low and may not reflect franchisee reality
28 of 32 signed-not-open agreements from one NJ operator — extreme pipeline concentration risk with no disclosed progress or capitalization info
Note 4 shows 21 franchised outlets vs Item 20 showing 17 — likely officer-owned studios counted differently in financial vs FDD reporting
Company-owned Table 4 shows TN going from 1 to 0 in 2024 but Table 1 shows 5→5 total — TN relocation accounts for discrepancy
14-month fiscal period (2024) not comparable to 12-month prior years; Item 19 uses calendar year while Item 21 uses fiscal year
Training described as 3-5 days but table totals 48 hours requiring minimum 5-6 days
